name: ChkStart_LINSyncDelTimingViolation
title: ChkStart_LINSyncDelTimingViolation
description: Checks the timing of the synchronization break field in LIN headers.
An event will be generated, if the measured length [in bit times] of break delimiter is outside of the specified range.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.description: Minimum length of break delimiter shall not be checked
Minimum allowed length of break delimiter
